reasons: Complaint or dispute about past work
operator_summary: Lead is making a complaint about work carried out last month and demanding compensation for a remedial job done by a third party. The message contains an implicit legal threat. This must not receive an automated draft reply.
suggested_operator_action: Review the job history for David Jones. If the complaint relates to a real job, escalate to the business owner before any response. Do not draft or send any reply through the assistant.
